sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INTEGER, values_list LIST<Integer>);
SELECT id, list_reduce(values_list, (x, y) -> x + y) AS sum FROM test_table;
UPDATE test_table SET values_list = list_reduce(values_list, (x, y) -> x || y) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, list_reduce(values_list, (x, y) -> x * y) AS product FROM test_table;
